name: @postman-cse/onboarding-insights
description: GitHub Action to onboard Postman Insights discovered services to API Catalog workspaces.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/cli.cjs
scripts.check:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist
